HomePage.title: Marketorix
HomePage.heroHeadline: AI That Works For Your Business
HomePage.description: We fix broken AI tools, connect your business systems, and build smart automations — so you save time, cut costs, and stay ahead of the competition.

autonomous_agents.title: Workflow Automation
autonomous_agents.description: Stop doing manually what AI can handle. We build smart automations that process orders, generate reports, handle data entry, and manage routine tasks — without your team lifting a finger.

strategy.title: AI Roadmap & Cost Control
strategy.description: Not sure where to start with AI? Or already spending too much on tools that underdeliver? We assess your business, find the highest-impact opportunities, and build a clear plan with concrete ROI.

custom_solutions.title: AI Trained on Your Business
custom_solutions.description: Generic AI gives generic answers. We build custom AI that knows your products, policies, pricing, and processes — so it gives accurate, useful answers every time, to your team and your customers.

integration.title: Connect Your Systems
integration.description: Your CRM doesn't talk to your accounting software. Your webshop data lives in a different world than your inventory. We connect your tools so AI can actually use your business data.

support.title: Ongoing AI Support
support.description: AI tools degrade over time. We keep your automations running smoothly, fix issues before they become problems, and make sure your monthly AI costs stay predictable and under control.

industry_specific.title: AI For Your Industry
industry_specific.description: Every industry has its own rules, language, and compliance requirements. We build AI solutions that understand the specifics of healthcare, logistics, finance, retail, and manufacturing.

nl_to_sql.title: Ask Your Data Questions
nl_to_sql.description: Skip the complex reports and dashboards. We build tools where you or your team can simply ask 'What sold best last quarter?' and get an instant, accurate answer from your own data.

chatbots.title: Smart Customer Support
chatbots.description: Not just another FAQ bot. We build AI assistants that actually answer questions, process requests, and resolve issues — across your website, WhatsApp, and email.

code_review.title: AI App Health Check & Security
code_review.description: Your developer used ChatGPT to build it. But is the code secure? Does it actually scale? We audit, debug, and fix AI-generated code before it becomes a costly problem.
features: Detection of hidden bugs in AI-generated code
Security vulnerability & data privacy checks
Performance optimization for faster, cheaper operation
Implementation of guardrails to prevent future issues

recovery.title: AI App Rescue & Optimization
recovery.description: Your AI chatbot gives wrong answers? Your automation costs are spiraling? We step in to fix, rebuild, and optimize AI tools that aren't delivering on their promise.
features: Fixing inaccurate or 'hallucinating' AI responses
Reducing monthly AI tool costs (often by 30–50%)
Rebuilding data pipelines for better accuracy
Migrating to more cost-effective infrastructure

autonomous_dev.title: Workflow Automation
autonomous_dev.description: We build digital assistants that handle your team's most repetitive work — order processing, document handling, data entry, email triage — running 24/7 without errors.
features: Multi-step task automation across your tools
Direct connection to your CRM, email, and admin systems
Self-correcting logic that handles edge cases
Human approval steps for important decisions

chatbot_dev.title: Smart Customer Support Bot
chatbot_dev.description: Go beyond a basic FAQ page. We build AI assistants that actually resolve customer issues, check order status, process returns, and book appointments — all automatically.
features: Integration with your CRM & order management
Remembers conversation context and customer history
Works on your website, WhatsApp, and email
Accurate answers grounded in your actual business data

integration.title: System Integration & Data Preparation
integration.description: AI is only as good as the data it can access. We connect your existing tools — CRM, accounting, webshop, documents — so AI can actually work with your real business information.
features: Structured storage for AI-ready business data
Cleaning and organizing messy documents and records
Option to run AI on your own servers for maximum privacy
Secure connections between all your business tools

strategy.title: AI Roadmap & Compliance
strategy.description: Not sure where AI can save you time and money? We assess your business processes, identify the biggest opportunities, and deliver a concrete plan with clear costs and expected returns.
features: Risk assessment and data security review
EU AI Act & GDPR compliance guidance
Recommendations: build custom vs. use existing tools
Clear ROI projection per automation opportunity

custom_dev.title: AI Trained on Your Knowledge
custom_dev.description: Your business has unique expertise — product specs, policies, pricing rules, procedures. We build AI that's trained specifically on your knowledge base, so it gives accurate, company-specific answers.
features: Custom AI grounded in your documents and data
Fine-tuned for your industry's terminology
Integrated with your internal knowledge base
Runs in a secure, isolated environment

support.title: Ongoing AI Management & Support
support.description: AI isn't a set-and-forget tool. We actively manage your AI systems to keep them accurate, fast, and cost-effective — so you don't have to worry about it.
features: Continuous monitoring for accuracy issues
Regular updates to keep responses current
Monthly cost tracking and optimization
Priority support when something breaks

industry_apps.title: AI For Your Industry
industry_apps.description: Every sector has unique compliance rules and workflows. We build AI solutions that speak your industry's language and respect its specific requirements.
features: GDPR-compliant AI for healthcare practices
Financial forecasting & anomaly detection
Supply chain optimization & demand planning
Personalized recommendations for retail & e-commerce

nl_to_sql.title: Ask Your Data Questions
nl_to_sql.description: Stop waiting for reports. We build tools that let you and your team ask business questions in plain language — and get instant answers from your own databases.
features: Ask questions like 'What sold best in Q3?' and get answers
Automatic charts and dashboards from your questions
Access controls so each team sees only their data
Works with your existing database (MySQL, PostgreSQL, etc.)

robert.name: Robert Zimerman
robert.bio: Over a decade of experience helping businesses bridge the gap between complex AI technology and practical, results-driven solutions. Robert translates technical possibilities into clear business value.

lars.name: Lars Nyberg
lars.bio: Expert in building reliable, accurate AI systems. Lars leads our engineering team to deliver solutions that work in the real world — secure, fast, and built to handle your specific business data.

devTeam.title: Flexible Team, Right-Sized For You
devTeam.description: Beyond our core team, we have a trusted network of specialized AI engineers and data experts. We scale our team up or down to match your project — you only pay for what you need.

form.name: Name
form.message: Tell us about your business and what you'd like to improve

CTA.title: Ready to see what AI can do for your business?

CookieConsent.message: We use cookies to optimize your experience and analyze site traffic. By continuing to use our site, you consent to our data practices.

EngagementModels.title: Pricing & Packages
EngagementModels.description: Clear pricing, no surprises. Choose the package that fits where you are in your AI journey.

audit.title: AI Quick Scan
audit.description: We analyze your business processes, tools, and data. You get a concrete report showing where AI can save you the most time and money — with clear cost estimates.
features: Process & Tools Inventory
Data Privacy & GDPR Check
Cost-Benefit Analysis per Opportunity
Prioritized Action Plan

poc.title: Working Prototype
poc.description: We build and deploy a working AI tool — a smart chatbot, automated workflow, or data assistant — connected to your real business data. You test it, we refine it.
features: Custom AI Built for Your Use Case
Connected to Your Existing Systems
Tested with Your Real Data
Ready for Production Deployment

retainer.title: Ongoing AI Partner
retainer.description: Continuous access to our AI team for maintenance, optimization, new automations, and support. Think of us as your external AI department.
features: Monthly Optimization & Updates
Priority Support
New Automation Development
Dedicated Contact Person

Process.title: How We Work
Process.description: A clear, proven process — so you always know exactly what's happening and what comes next.

step1.title: 1. Free Consultation
step1.description: We talk about your business, your challenges, and where AI could help. No jargon, no sales pitch — just an honest assessment.

step2.title: 2. Analysis & Plan
step2.description: We map your processes, assess your data, and deliver a concrete plan with costs, timeline, and expected savings.

step3.title: 3. Build & Test
step3.description: We build your AI solution, connect it to your systems, and test it with your real data. You're involved every step of the way.

step4.title: 4. Launch & Support
step4.description: We deploy, train your team, and provide ongoing support to make sure everything keeps running smoothly.

CaseStudies.title: Real Results For Real Businesses
CaseStudies.description: We don't just build AI — we deliver measurable time and cost savings.

fintech.title: Logistics Company — Admin Automation
fintech.description: Automated order processing and document handling for a Belgian logistics firm, saving their team over 30 hours per week on manual data entry.

healthcare.title: Medical Practice — Patient Intake
healthcare.description: Built a GDPR-compliant AI assistant that handles patient intake forms, appointment scheduling, and FAQ — reducing receptionist workload by half.

retail.title: E-commerce — Customer Support
retail.description: Deployed a smart support bot for an online retailer that handles product questions, order tracking, and returns — resolving 6 out of 10 requests without human help.

q1.question: Is my business data safe when using AI?
q1.answer: Absolutely. We can run AI models in isolated environments or even on your own servers — your data never leaves your control and never trains public AI models. We're fully GDPR compliant.

q2.question: Our AI tool costs are getting out of hand. Can you help?
q2.answer: This is one of our specialties. We typically reduce AI running costs by 30–50% through smarter model selection (using cheaper models for simple tasks), better prompt design, and optimized infrastructure.

q3.question: How long before we see results?
q3.answer: A working prototype is typically ready in 4–6 weeks. For simpler automations like a customer support bot, you can be live even sooner. Our approach is iterative — you see progress every week, not just at the end.

q4.question: We already tried AI and it didn't work. Can you fix it?
q4.answer: Yes — a large part of our work is rescuing underperforming AI projects. Whether it's a chatbot giving wrong answers or an automation that's too expensive to run, we diagnose the issue and fix it, often within days.
